description: CRIT-EC-002 mandates a dedicated test for EC-T-004 (toggle sort while debounce pending) AND a dedicated test for EC-C-007 (DomainSnapshotReceived while debounce mid-flight). Neither test exists anywhere in promptnotes/src/lib/feed/__tests__/. The string 'EC-T-004' appears in zero test files. The string 'EC-C-007' appears in zero test files. These ECs are explicitly called out as guarding race-freedom obligations PROP-FILTER-022 and PROP-FILTER-024, so without them the race-freedom claim is unverified. The current debounce DOM tests cover EC-S-005/EC-S-010/EC-S-014/EC-S-016 only.

evidence.snippet: No 'EC-T-004' or 'EC-C-007' label in feedReducer.search.test.ts, computeVisible.test.ts, searchPredicate.test.ts, sortByUpdatedAt.test.ts, dom/SearchInput.dom.vitest.ts, dom/SortToggle.dom.vitest.ts, dom/FeedList.search-empty.dom.vitest.ts, prop/searchPredicate.prop.test.ts, or prop/feedReducer.totality.test.ts.
